description: Measure the longest diameter of the pulmonary nodule in all three planes (axial, coronal, sagittal) on the chest CT using the location in ~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/preliminary_measurement.json. Calculate maximum/minimum diameters, asphericity, discrepancy flag, and shape classification. Save markups to ~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/multiplanar_measurements.mrk.json and the report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/nodule_sizing_report.json with fields: axial_diameter_mm, coronal_diameter_mm, sagittal_diameter_mm, maximum_diameter_mm, minimum_diameter_mm, asphericity_percent, discrepancy_flag, shape_classification.
